step_rationale: G-protein-coupled receptor mediating 5-oxo-ETE signaling; therapeutic target for myocardial injury.
mechanism: OXE-R (oxoeicosanoid receptor) transduces 5-oxo-ETE signaling to promote leukocyte recruitment and myocardial damage; a candidate cardioprotective target.

references.title: Oxoeicosanoid receptor inhibition alleviates acute myocardial infarction through activation of BCAT1.
